headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -41.6)
key_insights: Optimism trending up 109% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 134 quotes including 93 at strong intensity - people are expressing serious anger and dissatisfaction today.
• The frustration score of 48.3 sits in the lower-middle range of the 105-day period, showing significant but not extreme levels.
• Optimism rebounded sharply from yesterday's deep negative, while fears dropped dramatically from a high of 30.6 to well below average.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
